issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' not 'HasCardOnBoard'; the effect checks if your Leader is Nami, not if Nami is on board
Filter is incomplete; must specify minCost:2 and maxCost:8. Current filter only has maxCost:8, missing minCost constraint
SearchDeck action does not capture the 'look at 4 cards' mechanic and 'reveal up to 1' (optional reveal). Current DSL lacks parameters for deck search scope and reveal behavior
